Generic sync text measurement provider that emits graph-visible measurement facts.

## Import

```ts
import { textMeasurementProvider } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function textMeasurementProvider(opts: TextMeasurementProviderOptions): Node<Measurements>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `TextMeasurementProviderOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `Node<Measurements>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { textMeasurementProvider } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```
